text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm walking past a pet shop,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, these poor, hapless souls! How I<n>wish to
protect them!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is staring at some cute<n>animals
with an anguished<n>expression.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That kitten and puppy... How full of<n>unbridled
innocence their wide eyes<n>are.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No doubt they lack the power to<n>survive on their
own, much unlike their<n>wild counterparts...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But don't you worry... My art, the<n>Kongo Yaegaki
style of fighting, exists<n>to protect the weak and
the innocent!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall guard this store as your<n>protector until all
of you find your<n>rightful masters...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Did... Did you witness all of that just<n>now?
choice_data_list:
You looked like you were undergoing harsh
training just now.
So you also have a silly side, eh?
So you also have a silly side, eh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Did... Did you witness all of that just<n>now?
choice_data_list:
You looked like you were undergoing harsh
training just now.
So you also have a silly side, eh?
So you also have a silly side, eh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Training! Yes! I was doing just that!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was strengthening my resolve by<n>allowing my
emotions to run rampant!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is a brutal and painful method, but it<n>is all a part
of my martial arts training!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As Yaeno Muteki stands there, sweat<n>glistening
on her brow, she does<n>seem quite formidable.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki runs off and veers<n>around the
corner of the street with<n>unparalleled skill.
